'''ngogafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabellar|fabellar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabellar|fabellar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngogafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogafithi|ngogafithi]] || [[word:ngogafiji|ngogafiji]] || [[word:ngogafishi|ngogafishi]] || [[word:ngogafiki|ngogafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogafuthuthu|ngogafuthuthu]] || [[word:ngogafujuju|ngogafujuju]] || [[word:ngogafushushu|ngogafushushu]] || [[word:ngogafukuku|ngogafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogafuthu|ngogafuthu]] || [[word:ngogafuju|ngogafuju]] || [[word:ngogafushu|ngogafushu]] || [[word:ngogafuku|ngogafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogafufthuf|ngogafufthuf]] || [[word:ngogafufjuf|ngogafufjuf]] || [[word:ngogafufshuf|ngogafufshuf]] || [[word:ngogafufkuf|ngogafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogafethe|ngogafethe]] || [[word:ngogafeje|ngogafeje]] || [[word:ngogafeshe|ngogafeshe]] || [[word:ngogafeke|ngogafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogafothotho|ngogafothotho]] || [[word:ngogafojojo|ngogafojojo]] || [[word:ngogafoshosho|ngogafoshosho]] || [[word:ngogafokoko|ngogafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogafotho|ngogafotho]] || [[word:ngogafojo|ngogafojo]] || [[word:ngogafosho|ngogafosho]] || [[word:ngogafoko|ngogafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogafofthof|ngogafofthof]] || [[word:ngogafofjof|ngogafofjof]] || [[word:ngogafofshof|ngogafofshof]] || [[word:ngogafofkof|ngogafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogafĂŠthĂŠ|ngogafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogafĂŠjĂŠ|ngogafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogafĂŠshĂŠ|ngogafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogafĂŠkĂŠ|ngogafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogafathatha|ngogafathatha]] || [[word:ngogafajaja|ngogafajaja]] || [[word:ngogafashasha|ngogafashasha]] || [[word:ngogafakaka|ngogafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogafatha|ngogafatha]] || [[word:ngogafaja|ngogafaja]] || [[word:ngogafasha|ngogafasha]] || [[word:ngogafaka|ngogafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogafafthaf|ngogafafthaf]] || [[word:ngogafafjaf|ngogafafjaf]] || [[word:ngogafafshaf|ngogafafshaf]] || [[word:ngogafafkaf|ngogafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngogafasha|ngogafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogafshĂ«sha|ngogafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogafrosha|ngogafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogafmusha|ngogafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogafyasha|ngogafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogafnkshĂ«sha|gongogafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogafnkrosha|gongogafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogafnkmusha|gongogafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogafnkyasha|gongogafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngogagafasha|ngogagafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogagafshĂ«sha|ngogagafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogagafrosha|ngogagafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogagafmusha|ngogagafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogagafyasha|ngogagafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogagafnkshĂ«sha|gongogagafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogagafnkrosha|gongogagafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogagafnkmusha|gongogagafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogagafnkyasha|gongogagafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngegĂŠfasha|ngegĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngegĂŠfshĂ«sha|ngegĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngegĂŠfrosha|ngegĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngegĂŠfmusha|ngegĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngegĂŠfyasha|ngegĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongegĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|gongegĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongegĂŠfnkrosha|gongegĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongegĂŠfnkmusha|gongegĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongegĂŠfnkyasha|gongegĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngogfafasha|ngogfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogfafshĂ«sha|ngogfafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogfafrosha|ngogfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogfafmusha|ngogfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogfafyasha|ngogfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogfafnkshĂ«sha|gongogfafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogfafnkrosha|gongogfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogfafnkmusha|gongogfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogfafnkyasha|gongogfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
